K. Hariprasad, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) and Shri Mihir Subodhbhai Shah, as member of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises and for the said purpose, makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises number S.O. 1375(E), dated the 27th May, 2013, namely:— In the said notification, for serial numbers 11 and 37 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely:— “ 11. Shri B. K. Hariprasad, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) Member 37. Shri Mihir Subodhbhai Shah, Ahmedabad Member”. [F. No. 1(19)/2013-NBMSME] AMARENDRA SINHA, Addl. Secy. and Development Commissioner Note: The principal notification were published in the Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 1375(E), dated the 27th May, 2013 and subsequently amended vide notification number S.O. 3241(E) dated 21st October, 2013. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
